# Brand Colors -- Brand Check Test

## Primary Palette

| Role | Hex | RGB |
|------|-----|-----|
| Primary | #2F99A4 | rgb(47, 153, 164) |
| Accent | #FF4D00 | rgb(255, 77, 0) |
| Text | #585961 | rgb(88, 89, 97) |
| Background | #FFFFFF | rgb(255, 255, 255) |

## Semantic Roles

| Role | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| Error | #D14343 | Destructive actions, error states |
| Success | #47B881 | Success confirmations |
| Warning | #F0C040 | Warning alerts |

## CSS Custom Properties

```css
:root {
  --color-primary: #2F99A4;
  --color-accent: #FF4D00;
  --color-text: #585961;
  --color-background: #FFFFFF;
  --color-error: #D14343;
  --color-success: #47B881;
  --color-warning: #F0C040;
}
```
